products.name: SFF Mission Computers
products.descriptor: Rugged small form-factor LRU mission computers for C5ISR and vetronics

evidence.snippet:
SFF Mission Computers
Minimize SWaP without sacrificing performance. Curtiss-Wright's modular LRUs leverage industry-leading, open standards-based technology in highly rugged, miniature packaging.
[Explore](/products/computing-systems/sff)

products.name: USFF Mission Computers
products.descriptor: Ultra-small form-factor rugged mission computers for SWaP-constrained platforms

evidence.snippet:
The military and aerospace market maintains an insatiable appetite for smaller, lighter, and cheaper. Recent technological breakthroughs in SWaP-C reduction have yielded the introduction of USFF mission computer and networking systems.
![A Powerhouse of Performance in an Ultra-Small Form Factor](/sites/default/files/2021-10/wp-fifty-ultra-small-form-factor-mission-systems.png "A Powerhouse of Performance in an Ultra-Small Form Factor")

products.name: PacStar Communications Solutions
products.descriptor: Tactical rugged low-SWaP communications hardware and software for mission-critical networks

evidence.snippet:
PacStar Communications
Advanced tactical communications solutions for mission-critical applications.
[Explore](/products/networking-communications/pacstar)

products.name: Turret Drive Stabilization System (TDSS)
products.descriptor: Modular turret aiming and stabilization drive system for military ground platforms

evidence.snippet: For over 30 years, Curtiss-Wright has delivered advanced turret drive stabilization systems (TDSS) to more than 30 military organizations worldwide. Our field-proven solutions ensure mission-critical gun turret control and tank stabilization in the most demanding combat environments.

products.name: TrustedCOTS
products.descriptor: Embedded security framework for COTS hardware using open security architecture to protect applications and data

evidence.snippet:
###### TrustedCOTS and Enhanced TrustedCOTS for Trusted Computing
TrustedCOTS™ and Enhanced TrustedCOTS technologies use an OSA for embedding security, enabling customers to leverage S-SOTA technologies.

unresolved_questions: Product detail pages for all 15 prioritized products were skipped in the mirror (status=skipped_budget or skipped_class_budget). Corpus only contains top-level category/navigation pages, so per-product specs, NDAA compliance claims, and readiness details could not be confirmed from primary sources.
NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status is unknown for all products — no product-specific NDAA claims found in fetched corpus pages.
Blue UAS status is unknown for all products — no DIU Blue UAS claims found in fetched corpus.

TrustedCOTS is classified as a family (TrustedCOTS + Enhanced TrustedCOTS variants) but its dedicated capability page (/capabilities/technologies/security/trustedcots) was skipped; exact product boundaries uncertain.
VPX6-731 is classified as a single SKU based on the 6U GPU card introduction callout on the computing page; full specs require the product detail page.
